meaning: adj.仅用一种语言的,仅懂一种语言的
examples: Unlike traditional monolingual programs, bilingual classrooms aim at developing students' ability to use two languages by middle school.
Considered "bilingual," I made 10% more than my "monolingual" colleagues.
Between 900 and 1000 monolingual and partially bilingual Cusco Quechua learners enrol in the programme every year.
For monolingual people like myself, dealing with a foreign language can be confusing.
